paper_title: Verifiability of genus-level classification under quantification and parsimony theories: a case study of follicucullid radiolarians

methods.description: Preparation of a meta-dataset derived from specimens and publications, including coding of morphological features for taxonomically stable species.

steps.description: The dataset is derived from our own specimens, in particular Longtanella, and publications.
steps.searchable_summary: compile dataset from specimens and publications

steps.description: Morphological features were coded as binary (0, 1) for characters that are present or absent and as a stepped code (0, 1, 2, …) for metric continuous characters.
steps.searchable_summary: code morphological features as binary or stepped codes

methods.description: Application of HQT-II for discrimination and classification of samples using qualitative data, resolving multicollinearity, and performing correlation and cluster analyses.

steps.description: Before HQT-II analysis, multicollinearity has to be resolved through correlation analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: perform correlation analysis to resolve multicollinearity

steps.description: We performed HQT-II and associated analyses with the statistical add-on, BellCurve for Excel v. 3.20.
steps.searchable_summary: perform HQT-II analysis using BellCurve for Excel

steps.description: The categorical dataset for HQT-II comprises 'categorical external variables' and 'classification into more than 2 or 3 groups'.
steps.searchable_summary: classify dataset into groups for HQT-II

steps.description: We performed a correlation analysis, then the HQT-II analysis itself, and then a cluster analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: perform correlation, HQT-II, and cluster analyses

methods.description: Conducting phylogenetic analysis using TNT for parsimony analysis, constructing a time tree, and performing ancestral state reconstruction.

steps.description: Phylogenetic analysis was conducted using the New Technology search in TNT v. 1.5.
A time tree was constructed with the paleotree package in R, with stratigraphic ranges of species.
steps.searchable_summary: construct time tree using paleotree in R

steps.description: An ancestral state reconstruction (ASR) of phylogenetically informative characters was conducted at the genus level in R with the ape package.
steps.searchable_summary: perform ASR using ape package in R
